chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 334 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 19.08.2020 Mr. Zubair Ali Khaskheli, advocate for petitioner. ----------- Through the instant petition, petitioner Mrs. Shehla Ashray has prayed for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of moveable and immoveable properties/assets, details whereof are mentioned in the Schedule/Amended Schedule of Properties attached with the memo of petition, available at page 53/A and 55, which were left by her deceased father, namely, Syed Muneer Hussain Rizvi s/o. Syed Zakir Hussain Rizvi, who allegedly died on 09.02.2019 at Karachi, leaving behind Mst. Begum Khursheed Muneer Rizvi (widow), Mst. Sheeba Mehdi (daughter), Mst. Saba T. Nazar (daughter), Mrs. Shahla Ashray (daughter/petitioner), Mst. Narjis Kazmi (daughter), and Syed Raza Rizvi (son) as his legal heirs. Original Death Certificate of deceased as well as photostat copies of Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA, title documents of the immovable properties and investment statements are also filed at page 15, 21, 23 and 63 to 155. Legal heirs No. 1, 2, 3, 5 and 6 have filed their Affidavits of No-Objection for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in favour of the petitioner. Legal heirs No. 2, 3, 5 and 6 have also executed Special Power of Attorney duly attested by the Notary Public at Karachi in favour of the petitioner. Two witnesses, namely, Azfar Abbas Ashray s/o. Shahe-e-Abbas Ashray and Hina Khalid Ahshray w/o. Azfar Abbas Ashray have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above.

Shahe-e-Abbas Ashray and Hina Khalid Ahshray w/o. Azfar Abbas Ashray have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. 2 Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 19.10.2019; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 21.11.2019. Today petitioner and legal heir No. 1 as well as above named witnesses are present. They affirm the contents of memo of petition as well as their affidavits and also verify their signatures made thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of movable and immovable properties/assets shown in the Schedule/Amended Schedule of Properties, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
